nodes.label: AI as code generation assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI without sufficient context leading to poor output
nodes.grounding_span: If I explain my requirement in a complete way and provide enough context, it saves a lot of time

nodes.label: AI for communication refinement
nodes.label_negative: Informal or unclear communication without AI
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI a lot to phrase my ideas or what I want to send in a more formal way

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.grounding_span: any kind of brainstorming or ideation sessions are greatly improved by conversations with LLMs

nodes.label: AI as strategic thinking partner
nodes.label_negative: AI suggesting suboptimal or overly complex changes
nodes.grounding_span: ask the AI if they think it's the most optimal idea

nodes.label: AI as validation partner for client needs
nodes.grounding_span: most of the times I validate whatever I came with with an AI

nodes.label: AI delegation for simple tasks
nodes.grounding_span: For simple tasks I try to delegate it as much as possible

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.label_negative: AI producing final output without iteration
nodes.grounding_span: it's about collaboration, understanding their changes, asking for adjustments if something is off

nodes.label: AI requiring context explanation
nodes.grounding_span: no matter how much context or how hard you try to explain something, the AI will not get it

nodes.label: AI as productivity enhancer
nodes.label_negative: AI use without dedicated non-AI practice
nodes.grounding_span: it might decrease the 'brain' productivity

nodes.label: AI as job threat
nodes.label_negative: Human-specific skills to maintain job relevance
nodes.grounding_span: we will have to come with something very human-specific in order to not lose our jobs

nodes.label: Optimal solution quality
